title: Shopify Admin Order
description: Schema for a Shopify order resource in the Admin API

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the order

order_number.description: The sequential order number used to identify orders in the admin

name.description: The human-readable name of the order (e.g., #1001)

created_at.description: The date and time when the order was created

updated_at.description: The date and time when the order was last modified

processed_at.description: The date and time when an order was processed

total_price.description: The sum of all line item prices, discounts, shipping, and taxes

subtotal_price.description: The price of the order after discounts but before shipping and taxes

total_tax.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the order

total_discounts.description: The total discounts applied to the price of the order

currency.description: The three-letter code for the currency used for the payment

financial_status.description: The payment status of the order

note.description: An optional note that a shop owner can attach to the order

customer.description: The customer who placed the order

line_items.description: A list of line item objects, each containing information about an item in the order

shipping_address.description: The mailing address to where the order will be shipped

billing_address.description: The mailing address associated with the payment method

fulfillments.description: A list of fulfillments associated with the order

refunds.description: A list of refunds applied to the order
